description: A bus driver reports a mechanical failure. A dispatcher must manage the situation by sending a replacement bus and maintenance crew.

nodes.task_description: Receive a radio call from a driver reporting a breakdown and their location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the breakdown event, including the vehicle number and location.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a road supervisor and a maintenance crew to the bus's location.
Identify a spare bus and dispatch it to the location to pick up the stranded passengers and continue the route (a 'bus bridge').

expected_outcome.value: A replacement bus is dispatched to maintain service.
